page.title: Consumer — Query Prescriptions
page.description: Search prescriptions on the FHIR Server using various criteria
page.emptyPrompt: Enter search criteria to get started
page.quickStartDescription: Reuse recent submissions or saved searches here, then refine the query on the left.
page.quickStartEmpty: No search helpers are available yet.

quickStartScenario.exampleLoaded: A basic query example was loaded for you. Search now or refine the criteria first.

shortcuts.importDescription: Open a local FHIR Bundle JSON file and inspect it directly in Consumer without going back to Creator or resubmitting it to the FHIR Server.
shortcuts.importDropHint: You can also drag a `.json` file directly into the Consumer window.
shortcuts.examplesDescription: Fill the current Basic / Date / Complex tab with a sample query so demos and feature checks can start faster.

dropzone.title: Drop to Import a Bundle JSON
dropzone.description: RxFHIR will parse the FHIR Bundle directly inside Consumer so you can inspect the result and detail views immediately.

queryStepTexts.custodianFallback: (custodian chain is unsupported, so the app falls back to identifier search and filters afterward)
queryStepTexts.authorFallback: (author chain is unsupported, so the app falls back to identifier search and filters afterward)
queryStepTexts.organizationNotFound: No organization matched the organization code.

recent.title: Recent Submissions
recent.description: Recently created prescriptions stay here so you can quickly reuse them in search.
recent.fillComplexHydratedOrganization: This recent submission was missing cached organization details, so the app reloaded the Bundle and filled the organization code.
recent.fillComplexHydratedAuthor: This recent submission was missing cached physician details, so the app reloaded the Bundle and filled the physician name.
recent.fillComplexFromBundleOrganization: This recent submission is not a full prescription Bundle. The app used the latest prescription for the same patient to fill the organization code.
recent.fillComplexFromBundleAuthor: This recent submission is not a full prescription Bundle. The app used the latest prescription for the same patient to fill the physician name.
recent.fillComplexOrganizationUnavailable: This recent submission is not a full prescription Bundle, and no organization information is available yet, so only the patient identifier could be filled.
recent.fillComplexAuthorUnavailable: This recent submission is not a full prescription Bundle, and no physician information is available yet, so only the patient identifier could be filled.

saved.title: Favorites / Recent Searches
saved.description: Click to rerun a search, or star it to keep it as a favorite.

recentFiles.title: Open Recent
recentFiles.description: Quickly reopen recently imported or exported Bundle JSON files without browsing for them again.

results.emptyHint: Use the form on the left to search
results.errorHint: Check the error message on the left, then verify the FHIR Server setting and connection before retrying.
results.filterInsight: The app first found {{fetched}} candidate bundle(s), then the additional filter reduced the result to {{matched}}.

reasons.generic: No prescriptions matched the current search criteria.
reasons.basicIdentifier: No prescriptions were found for identifier {{identifier}}.
reasons.basicName: No prescriptions were found for patient names matching "{{name}}".
reasons.date: No prescriptions were found for identifier {{identifier}} on {{date}}.
reasons.complexOrganization: No prescriptions were found for identifier {{identifier}} with organization code {{organizationId}}.
reasons.complexAuthor: No prescriptions were found for identifier {{identifier}} with physician name {{authorName}}.

suggestions.retry: Resolve the error shown on the left, then run the search again.
suggestions.checkServer: Confirm that you are connected to the same FHIR Server that was used when the prescription was created.
suggestions.checkIdentifier: Verify the patient identifier carefully to avoid missing or extra characters.
suggestions.preferIdentifier: If name search returns nothing, try searching by patient identifier for a more reliable match.
suggestions.checkDate: Run a basic search first, then compare the date against the prescription's recorded submission time.
suggestions.checkOrganization: Confirm that the organization code exactly matches the one used when the prescription was created.
suggestions.checkAuthor: Confirm that the physician name exactly matches the value stored in the prescription details.
suggestions.broadenSearch: Try removing the additional filter first, then narrow the results step by step.

results.keyboardHint: Use the Up and Down arrow keys to move between results, then press Enter to open details.

announcements.searchCompletedFiltered: Search completed. Showing {{count}} result(s) out of {{total}}.
announcements.noResults: Search completed, but no matching results were found.
announcements.searchFailed: Search failed and no results were loaded.
